class.name: SolidTorus
class.description: [SolidTorus] builds an OCCT torus solid from a major radius, a minor radius, and an optional center point. The torus is aligned to the global Z axis.

method.name: build_torus
method.description: Builds a torus whose ring center is [param major_radius] away from the rotation axis and whose tube radius is [param minor_radius].
